name: aws-amplify
description: Build and deploy full-stack web and mobile apps with AWS Amplify Gen2 using guided workflows for authentication, data models, storage, GraphQL APIs, and Lambda functions.

interface.shortDescription: Build full-stack apps with AWS Amplify Gen2 using TypeScript code-first DX.
interface.longDescription: AWS Amplify Gen2 expertise for building full-stack web and mobile apps with authentication, data models, storage, GraphQL APIs, and Lambda functions.
defaultPrompt: Add Amplify Auth to this app.
Create an Amplify Gen2 data model with relationships.
Deploy this app with Amplify Gen2.
